name: Amu-Aa
description: Amu-Aa (also known as "eater of the donkey/ass", or "eater of the phallus")[a][1][2][3] is one of the gods that goes with Osiris during the second hour of the night.[4][5](To learn more about the hours of the night, see the article on Amduat.)
aliases: or "eater of the phallus")[a][1][2][3] is one of the gods that goes with Osiris during the second hour of the night
